SweetHome3D.3DError.message:
Sweet Home 3D will exit now because of a fatal error
in the 3D rendering system of you computer. Please update the
DirectX/OpenGL drivers of your computer graphics card.
SweetHome3D.3DError.title: 3D Error
SweetHome3D.confirmSaveAfter3DError.mess:
Sweet Home 3D must exit now because of a fatal error in
3D rendering system. Do you want to save all modified homes?
AppletApplication.3DError.message:
Sweet Home 3D can't work correctly because of a fatal error
in the 3D rendering system of you computer.
Please update the DirectX/OpenGL drivers of your computer graphics card.

HomeAppletController.homeLengthError:
The home data length (%1$s MB) is larger than the maximum length accepted by the server (%2$s MB).
Delete some imported furniture and/or images to reduce the length of saved data.
The imported furniture unavailable on the server is written in italic in the furniture list.
SweetHome3DApplet.requirementsMessage:
Sweet Home 3D Online may be run under Windows, Mac OS X 10.4 / 10.7, Linux and Solaris.
It requires Java version 5 or superior.

Please, check Java version set in Java preferences under Mac OS X,
or update your Java Runtime to the latest version available at java.com under the other systems.
SweetHome3DApplet.unauthorizedHostError: Sweet Home 3D Online is not authorized to run from the web server you're visiting.
SweetHome3DApplet.signatureError:
If you want to run Sweet Home 3D Online, you must relaunch your browser,
display this page again and accept the displayed digital signature.

HomePane.message.title: Message
HomePane.CREATE_WALLS.tipMessage:
Click in the plan at the start point of the new wall, then
click or double-click at its end point.
As long as you don't double-click or press the Escape key,
each new click indicates the opposite point of the current
wall and the start point of the next wall.
When the plan has focus, you may switch to keyboard entry
at any time by pressing the enter key.
To create a round wall press Ctrl key (or alt / option key
under macOS) while clicking at the end point of wall.

If you already created a room, you may create the walls
around it by double-clicking anywhere in that room.
HomePane.CREATE_ROOMS.tipMessage:
Create a new room or a new surface in the plan using either way:

  • click at each corner of the room, then double-click at its last
    point or press the Escape key after you added the last point;
    when the plan has focus, you may switch to keyboard entry
    at any time by pressing the enter key;
  • double-click anywhere inside an existing closed surface
    (i.e. surrounded by walls).
HomePane.CREATE_POLYLINES.tipMessage:
Click in the plan at the start point of the new polyline, then
at each point of the polyline until you double-click at its end
point or press Escape. If you double-click on the start
point, a polygon will be created, and if you press Ctrl key
(or alt / option key under macOS) while drawing the first segment,
a curve will be created.
When the plan has focus, you may switch to keyboard entry
at any time by pressing the enter key.
HomePane.CREATE_DIMENSION_LINES.tipMessa:
Create a new dimension in the plan using one of these ways:

  • click at the start point of the dimension, click at its end point,
    then click a third time where the dimension will be located;
    when the plan has focus, you may switch to keyboard entry
    at any time by pressing the enter key;
  • double-click on a furniture border, a wall side or a room side,
    then click a third time where the dimension will be located;
  • press Ctrl key (or alt / option key under macOS) and click
    at the start point to display the dialog box which will let you
    create an elevation dimension.
HomePane.CREATE_LABELS.tipMessage:
Click in the plan at the location where a new text
should be added, then enter its text in the dialog box
that will appear.

HomePane.openDamagedHome.message:
The data of the home "%1$s"
is damaged and %2$d 3D models and/or images it needs can't be read.
It's still possible to edit this home, but only if damaged images and the furniture using
damaged 3D models are replaced by red images and boxes, or removed, as you prefer.
Choose the option you want.

HomePane.confirmSave.message:
Do you want to save home %s ?

HomePane.confirmSave.title: Close
HomePane.confirmSaveNewerHome.message:
Do you want really to save home
"%s" ?
This home was created with a more recent version of Sweet Home 3D.
The information added to home in that version will be lost
if you save it with the version of Sweet Home 3D you use now.
If you don't want to lose this information, please save this home
under a different name.
HomePane.confirmSaveNewerHome.title: Save

will be lost if you exit now.

HomePane.about.title: About Sweet Home 3D
HomePane.about.message:
Sweet Home 3D ®
Version %1$s

ZIP format management by JSZip
3D vector and matrix operations by glMatrix
Decimal numbers handling by big.js
SAX XML parser handling by jsXmlSaxParser
SVG path compilation by Batik
2D geometry and undo/redo libraries translated from OpenJDK
3D models and textures designed by contributors

Please, visit http://www.sweethome3d.com/
for support and bug report.

© Copyright 2024 Space Mushrooms <info@sweethome3d.com>
Distributed under GNU General Public License

Change the 3D model of the piece of furniture if necessary.

below until the front view matches to the front part of the piece. Hold the Shift

VideoPanel.tipLabel.text:
Move in the 3D view and click on the red button at the main locations
where the camera should pass by during the video. Then click on
Create and Save to generate a video file from the path you drew.
